skill.name: fal-audio
skill.description: Guidance for text-to-speech and speech-to-text workflows using fal.ai audio models.
skill.summary: Plan and run fal.ai audio generation and transcription tasks.
skill.author: sickn33

security_audit.summary: Static analysis found two hardcoded GitHub source URLs and two weak-cryptography pattern matches. The URL findings are source references only, and the cryptography findings are false positives from descriptive text in SKILL.md. No prompt injection, credential handling, executable code, or data exfiltration behavior was found in the reviewed file.

low_findings.title: Hardcoded Source Repository URLs
low_findings.description: SKILL.md includes public GitHub source links. These links are static documentation references, not executable network calls or evidence of data exfiltration.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: Both URL findings are visible as GitHub repository references in Markdown and front matter. No code path sends user data to these URLs.

low_findings.title: Weak Cryptography Pattern False Positive
low_findings.description: The weak cryptographic algorithm findings occur on descriptive text lines. No cryptographic algorithm, hashing function, encryption routine, or security-sensitive implementation is present.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: The referenced lines only describe text-to-speech and speech-to-text guidance. There is no crypto API, algorithm selection, or security control in the file.

content.user_title: Create and Transcribe Audio with fal.ai
content.value_statement: Audio teams need clear guidance when moving between text, generated speech, and transcripts. This skill helps Claude, Codex, and Claude Code plan fal.ai audio workflows with practical prompts and boundaries.
actual_capabilities: Guides text-to-speech task planning with fal.ai audio models.
Guides speech-to-text task planning for transcription workflows.
Helps structure prompts for audio generation requirements.
Helps define input, output, and review criteria for audio tasks.
Points users to the public source repository for more information.
limitations: Does not include executable scripts or direct API integration code.
Does not validate fal.ai account access, billing, or model availability.
Does not guarantee transcript accuracy or generated voice quality.
Requires users to handle credentials and files outside the skill text.

use_cases.title: Prototype narrated product content
use_cases.description: Prepare text-to-speech prompts and review criteria for short product walkthroughs or demos.

use_cases.title: Plan transcription for recorded meetings
use_cases.description: Define a speech-to-text workflow for turning recorded discussions into searchable notes.

use_cases.title: Design audio features for an app
use_cases.description: Outline requirements for generated speech, transcription, input formats, and quality checks.

prompt_templates.title: Start a text-to-speech task
prompt_templates.prompt: Help me plan a fal.ai text-to-speech task for this script. Identify voice requirements, pacing, output format, and review checks.

prompt_templates.title: Prepare a transcription workflow
prompt_templates.scenario: Basic speech-to-text planning for an audio file.
prompt_templates.prompt: Help me design a fal.ai speech-to-text workflow for a recorded meeting. Include preparation steps, expected transcript review, and cleanup tasks.

prompt_templates.title: Compare audio workflow options
prompt_templates.scenario: Intermediate planning across generation and transcription.
prompt_templates.prompt: Compare text-to-speech and speech-to-text workflow choices for my audio project. Focus on inputs, outputs, quality risks, and user review steps.

prompt_templates.title: Specify an end-to-end audio pipeline
prompt_templates.scenario: Advanced planning for a production audio feature.
prompt_templates.prompt: Create a detailed fal.ai audio workflow for an app feature that generates narration and transcribes user audio. Include data flow, validation, error handling, and release checks.

output_examples.input: Plan narration for a two-minute onboarding video.
output_examples.output: A task plan that lists script preparation, voice style, pronunciation checks, output format, and review steps before publishing.

output_examples.input: Create a workflow for transcribing customer interview recordings.
output_examples.output: A transcription workflow covering audio preparation, speaker labeling expectations, transcript cleanup, review ownership, and storage considerations.

output_examples.input: Design an app feature that turns user notes into spoken summaries.
output_examples.output: A feature outline with input handling, text review, speech generation settings, playback review, and user-facing error states.

best_practices: Review source audio quality before starting transcription tasks.
Define voice, pacing, pronunciation, and output format before generation.
Keep credentials, private recordings, and generated files outside prompts when possible.
anti_patterns: Do not send secrets or private audio unless the service and policy allow it.
Do not assume generated speech is ready for publication without review.
Do not rely on transcripts as final records without human verification.

faq.question: Does this skill run fal.ai audio models directly?
faq.answer: No. The reviewed skill provides guidance and patterns, not executable API calls.

faq.question: Can it help with both text-to-speech and speech-to-text?
faq.answer: Yes. The skill describes both generated speech and transcription workflows.

faq.question: Does it include credential handling?
faq.answer: No. Users must manage fal.ai credentials outside the skill content.

faq.question: Is the hardcoded URL a security problem?
faq.answer: The URL is a public GitHub source reference. It is not an executable network request.

faq.question: Can Claude Code or Codex use this for implementation planning?
faq.answer: Yes. It can help structure requirements before writing application code.

faq.question: Should generated audio and transcripts be reviewed?
faq.answer: Yes. Human review is important for accuracy, privacy, pronunciation, and publication quality.
